creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 165844
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.6.2-1lsb3.2.tar.gz is exists.
It has been changed only PPD files for some models.
DefaultMediaType for some models has been changed.
Media types for some models have been added.
Russian translation for some models has been added.

To Mr. Sato
I want to continue to rent space of FreeBSD project's public FTP server for distfile.
Would you download epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.6.2-1lsb3.2.tar.gz and upload it to public FTP?
